FROM (

SEL  7 as BK_METRIC_ID_INT,
RFMTY.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT as BK_FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUM_INT,
AEO.REGION AS BK_DIMENSION_3_DESCR  ,  
CAST(CAST ((SUM(CASE WHEN RFMTY.FISCAL_YEAR_AGE = 0 THEN MEJEL4.NET_USD_ACTUALS_AT_BUD_RT_AMT ELSE MEJEL4.NET_USD_AMT END  )) AS DECIMAL (26,2) ) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS MEASURE_VALUE_1_AMT                 
         
FROM
	$$FINLGLVWDB.MT_APSP_MANAGEMENT_HIER MAMH 
	INNER JOIN    $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_EXP_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_4FY MEJEL4 
		ON  ( MEJEL4.BK_COMPANY_CD= MAMH.FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CODE
			AND	MEJEL4.BK_DEPARTMENT_CD = MAMH.FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT_CODE)
	INNER JOIN   $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR  RFMTY
		ON (RFMTY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT= MEJEL4.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT)
   	INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.R_PL_HIERARCHY RPH
   		ON  ( MAMH.FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CODE = RPH.FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CODE
			AND MAMH.FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT_CODE = RPH.FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT_CODE)       	
      INNER JOIN $$PMMDATADB.APP_EL_FIN_DEPT_REGION AEO
  	ON (AEO.NODE_NAME=RPH.NODE_LEVEL07_NAME
  		AND AEO.FINANCIAL_DEPT_NAME ='SERVICES OPEX')
WHERE MAMH.NODE_LEVEL01_VALUE = '00511' 	
	AND MAMH.NODE_LEVEL02_NAME=(SEL NODE_NAME FROM $$PMMDATADB.APP_EL_FIN_DEPT_REGION
WHERE FINANCIAL_DEPT_NAME='SERVICES OPEX' AND REGION='WW_SALES')
	AND  RPH.NODE_LEVEL03_NAME =  'PROFORMA OPEX'
	AND RFMTY.FISCAL_YEAR_AGE IN (0,1,2)
	GROUP	BY AEO.REGION,RFMTY.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT ) N

FULL OUTER JOIN (  

SELECT 
	RFMTY.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT,
	AEO.REGION,
	CAST(CAST ((SUM(NEFC.USD_COMMIT_AMT)) AS DECIMAL (26,2) ) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) MEASURE_TARGET_VALUE_AMT
FROM  
	$$FINLGLVWDB.R_MANAGEMENT_HIERARCHY   RMH
	INNER JOIN  (SELECT  
                 					FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT       ,
               						FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT       ,
                					FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD            ,
                					EXPENSE_FUTURE_PUBLICATION_DT ,
                					COMPANY_CD                    ,
                					DEPARTMENT_CD                 ,
               						FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD          ,
                					FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT,
                					FUNCTIONAL_COMMIT_AMT         ,
                					USD_COMMIT_AMT                ,
                					USD_COMMIT_AT_ACTUAL_RATE_AMT ,
                					USD_COMMIT_AT_BUDGET_RATE_AMT 
                				FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_EXPENSE_FUTURE_COMMIT
                				WHERE (FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT,FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT,EXPENSE_FUTURE_PUBLICATION_DT)  IN 
                										( SELECT 
                 												NEFC.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT  ,
                												NEFC.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT ,
                												MAX(NEFC.EXPENSE_FUTURE_PUBLICATION_DT) AS EXPENSE_FUTURE_PUBLICATION_DT
                											FROM 
                												 $$FINLGLVWDB.N_EXPENSE_FUTURE_COMMIT NEFC,
               													 $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR RFD
                											WHERE 
                												 NEFC.EXPENSE_FUTURE_PUBLICATION_DT = RFD.CALENDAR_DATE
                											GROUP BY 1,2 )
                											AND (COMPANY_CD, DEPARTMENT_CD) in (sel FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CODE, FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT_CODE from $$FINLGLVWDB.R_PL_HIERARCHY where NODE_LEVEL03_NAME =  'PROFORMA OPEX' ) ) NEFC
  		ON( NEFC.COMPANY_CD=RMH.FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CODE
			AND  NEFC.DEPARTMENT_CD=RMH.FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT_CODE)
	          INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.R_PL_HIERARCHY RPH 
    	ON  ( RMH.FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CODE         = RPH.FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CODE
			AND RMH.FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT_CODE      = RPH.FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT_CODE)  
    INNER JOIN $$PMMDATADB.APP_EL_FIN_DEPT_REGION AEO
  	ON (AEO.NODE_NAME=RPH.NODE_LEVEL07_NAME
  		AND AEO.FINANCIAL_DEPT_NAME ='SERVICES OPEX')       
 	INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFMTY
		ON (NEFC.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT = RFMTY.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT
			 AND NEFC.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT = RFMTY.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT)
WHERE   RFMTY.FISCAL_YEAR_AGE IN (0,1,2)
AND RMH.NODE_LEVEL02_NAME=(SEL NODE_NAME FROM $$PMMDATADB.APP_EL_FIN_DEPT_REGION
WHERE FINANCIAL_DEPT_NAME='SERVICES OPEX' AND REGION='WW_SALES')
AND RMH.NODE_LEVEL01_VALUE = '00511' 
GROUP   BY 1,2) W
ON W.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT=N.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUM_INT
 AND N.BK_DIMENSION_3_DESCR =W.REGION

                				WHERE (FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT,FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT,EXPENSE_FUTURE_PUBLICATION_DT)  IN

  		ON( NEFB.COMPANY_CD=RMH.FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CODE
			AND  NEFB.DEPARTMENT_CD=RMH.FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT_CODE)
	          INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.R_PL_HIERARCHY RPH 
    	ON  ( RMH.FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CODE         = RPH.FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CODE
			AND RMH.FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT_CODE      = RPH.FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT_CODE)  
    INNER JOIN $$PMMDATADB.APP_EL_FIN_DEPT_REGION AEO
  	ON (AEO.NODE_NAME=RPH.NODE_LEVEL07_NAME
  		AND AEO.FINANCIAL_DEPT_NAME ='SERVICES OPEX')         
  	INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFMTY
		ON (NEFB.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT = RFMTY.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT
			 AND NEFB.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT = RFMTY.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT)
WHERE   RFMTY.FISCAL_YEAR_AGE IN (0,1,2)
AND RMH.NODE_LEVEL01_VALUE = '00511' 
AND RMH.NODE_LEVEL02_NAME=(SEL NODE_NAME FROM $$PMMDATADB.APP_EL_FIN_DEPT_REGION
WHERE FINANCIAL_DEPT_NAME='SERVICES OPEX' AND REGION='WW_SALES')
GROUP   BY 1,2) X
ON X.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT=N.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUM_INT
AND N.BK_DIMENSION_3_DESCR =X.REGION 
 
 WHERE N.BK_METRIC_ID_INT=7

			AND MAMH.FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT_CODE = RPH.FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT_CODE)       	
    INNER JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT GENERATION_10_CD 
    							FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_EIS_GEN_ACCOUNT MEGA

	INNER JOIN   $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR  RFMTY
		ON (RFMTY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT= MEJEL4.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT)
   	INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.R_PL_HIERARCHY RPH

    INNER JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT GENERATION_10_CD

 		ON (   MEJEL4.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD        = MEGA.GENERATION_10_CD)

                											AND (COMPANY_CD, DEPARTMENT_CD) in (sel FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CODE, FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT_CODE from $$FINLGLVWDB.R_PL_HIERARCHY where NODE_LEVEL03_NAME =  'PROFORMA OPEX' )  ) NEFC

	INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFMTY

			 AND NEFC.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT = RFMTY.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT)

GROUP   BY 1,2) W	

  ON W.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT=N.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUM_INT
	AND N.BK_DIMENSION_3_DESCR =W.REGION
	
	FULL OUTER JOIN (
	SELECT

	INNER JOIN  (SELECT

                				WHERE (FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT,FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT,EXPENSE_FUTURE_PUBLICATION_DT)  IN

	/*INNER JOIN   $$HRVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY  NCWP

 INNER JOIN $$PMMDATADB.APP_EL_FIN_DEPT_REGION AEO

DSHBRD.BK_DIMENSION_3_DESCR          ,
DSHBRD.BK_DIMENSION_4_DESCR          ,
CASE WHEN DSHBRD.BK_DIMENSION_5_DESCR      = 'UNKNOWN' THEN 'Total Engineering' ELSE DSHBRD.BK_DIMENSION_5_DESCR  END         ,
DSHBRD.BK_HIERARCHY_ID_INT           ,
DSHBRD.TIME_PERIOD_CD                ,
CASE WHEN DSHBRD.MEASURE_VALUE_1_DESCR LIKE '%M%'   AND upper(DSHBRD.BK_DIMENSION_4_DESCR) ='ALL BSE' THEN 'UNKNOWN' 
ELSE COALESCE(DSHBRD.MEASURE_VALUE_1_DESCR,'UNKNOWN') END AS MEASURE_VALUE_1_DESCR         ,
CASE WHEN TARGET_PLAN_DESCR  LIKE '%M%'   AND upper(DSHBRD.BK_DIMENSION_4_DESCR) ='ALL BSE' THEN 'UNKNOWN' 
ELSE COALESCE(TARGET_PLAN_DESCR,'UNKNOWN') END AS MEASURE_VALUE_2_DESCR         ,
DSHBRD.MEASURE_VALUE_3_DESCR         ,
DSHBRD.MEASURE_VALUE_4_DESCR         ,
DSHBRD.MEASURE_VALUE_5_DESCR         ,
DSHBRD.MEASURE_VALUE_6_DESCR         ,
DSHBRD.MEASURE_VALUE_7_DESCR         ,
DSHBRD.MEASURE_VALUE_8_DESCR         ,
CASE WHEN TARGET_THRESHOLD_DESCR  LIKE '%M%'   AND upper(DSHBRD.BK_DIMENSION_4_DESCR) ='ALL BSE' THEN 'UNKNOWN' 
ELSE COALESCE(TARGET_THRESHOLD_DESCR,'UNKNOWN') END AS MEASURE_TARGET_VALUE_DESCR    ,
DSHBRD.MEASURE_TOLERANCE_VALUE_DESCR ,
/*CASE WHEN DSHBRD.MEASURE_VALUE_1_DESCR LIKE '%M%'   AND upper(DSHBRD.BK_DIMENSION_4_DESCR) ='ALL BSE' THEN cast(DSHBRD.MEASURE_VALUE_1_AMT/1000 as decimal(26,7)) ELSE  DSHBRD.MEASURE_VALUE_1_AMT   END as MEASURE_VALUE_1_AMT           ,
CASE WHEN TARGET_PLAN_DESCR LIKE '%M%'
 AND upper(DSHBRD.BK_DIMENSION_4_DESCR) ='ALL BSE'  THEN cast(TARGET_PLAN_AMT/1000 as decimal(26,7)) ELSE  TARGET_PLAN_AMT END AS MEASURE_VALUE_2_AMT,*/
   CASE WHEN DSHBRD.MEASURE_VALUE_1_DESCR LIKE '%M%'   AND upper(DSHBRD.BK_DIMENSION_4_DESCR) ='ALL BSE' THEN cast(DSHBRD.MEASURE_VALUE_1_AMT*1000000 as decimal(26,2)) ELSE  DSHBRD.MEASURE_VALUE_1_AMT*1000000   END as MEASURE_VALUE_1_AMT           ,
CASE WHEN TARGET_PLAN_DESCR LIKE '%M%'
 AND upper(DSHBRD.BK_DIMENSION_4_DESCR) ='ALL BSE'  THEN cast(TARGET_PLAN_AMT*1000000 as decimal(26,2)) ELSE  TARGET_PLAN_AMT*1000000 END AS MEASURE_VALUE_2_AMT,
DSHBRD.MEASURE_VALUE_3_AMT           ,
DSHBRD.MEASURE_VALUE_4_AMT           ,
DSHBRD.MEASURE_VALUE_5_AMT           ,
DSHBRD.MEASURE_VALUE_6_AMT           ,
DSHBRD.MEASURE_VALUE_7_AMT           ,
DSHBRD.MEASURE_VALUE_8_AMT           ,
CASE WHEN TARGET_THRESHOLD_DESCR LIKE '%M%'  AND upper(DSHBRD.BK_DIMENSION_4_DESCR) ='ALL BSE'  THEN cast(TARGET_THRESHOLD_AMT*1000000 as decimal(26,2)) ELSE TARGET_THRESHOLD_AMT*1000000 END AS MEASURE_TARGET_VALUE_AMT      ,
DSHBRD.MEASURE_TOLERANCE_VALUE_AMT   ,
DSHBRD.MEASURE_BENCHMARK_CD          ,
DSHBRD.SORT_ORDER_POSITION_INT       ,
DSHBRD.LAST_UPDATE_DTM               ,
DSHBRD.METRIC_ACTIVE_FLG             ,
DSHBRD.BATCH_ID                      ,
NULL as MEASURE_VALUE_PREV_QTR_1_AMT  ,
NULL AS MEASURE_VALUE_PREV_QTR_2_AMT  ,
NULL AS MEASURE_VALUE_PREV_QTR_3_AMT  ,
NULL  AS MEASURE_VALUE_PREV_QTR_4_AMT  ,
NULL  AS MEASURE_VALUE_PREV_QTR_5_AMT  ,
DSHBRD.ACTION_PLAN_CMT               ,
DSHBRD.KEY_DRIVER_CMT         ,
'UNKNOWN' AS MSR_VAL_PREV_QTR_1_AMT_DESCR  ,
'UNKNOWN' AS  MSR_VAL_PREV_QTR_2_AMT_DESCR  ,
'UNKNOWN' AS MSR_VAL_PREV_QTR_3_AMT_DESCR  ,
'UNKNOWN' AS MSR_VAL_PREV_QTR_4_AMT_DESCR  ,
'UNKNOWN' AS MSR_VAL_PREV_QTR_5_AMT_DESCR  ,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM     ,           
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER            ,   
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM   ,             
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER 
FROM 
$$PMMDATADB.N_APSP_PMM_DASHBOARD_STAGING DSHBRD
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$PMMDATADB.N_APSP_PMM_THRESHOLD_STAGING THRSHLD
ON THRSHLD.BK_METRIC_ID_INT=DSHBRD.BK_METRIC_ID_INT
AND THRSHLD.BK_SCORECARD_ID_INT=DSHBRD.BK_SCORECARD_ID_INT
AND THRSHLD.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUM_INT=DSHBRD.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUM_INT
AND THRSHLD.BK_DIMENSION_3_DESCR=DSHBRD.BK_DIMENSION_3_DESCR
AND THRSHLD.BK_DIMENSION_4_DESCR=DSHBRD.BK_DIMENSION_4_DESCR
WHERE DSHBRD.BK_METRIC_ID_INT=267
AND DSHBRD.BK_SCORECARD_ID_INT=10
AND DSHBRD.BK_HIERARCHY_ID_INT = 3

sel
 1 as BK_SCORECARD_ID_INT  ,         
 7 as BK_METRIC_ID_INT       ,       
 'CORPORATE' as BK_METRIC_CLASS_ID        ,    
N.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUM_INT as BK_FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUM_INT,
'SERVICES OPEX' AS BK_DIMENSION_1_DESCR ,         
'TOTAL' AS BK_DIMENSION_2_DESCR  ,        
'Total Engineering' AS BK_DIMENSION_3_DESCR  ,        
'All BSE' AS BK_DIMENSION_4_DESCR     ,     
'Total Engineering' AS BK_DIMENSION_5_DESCR       ,   
2 AS BK_HIERARCHY_ID_INT           ,
'Quarterly' AS TIME_PERIOD_CD       ,         
'UNKNOWN' AS MEASURE_VALUE_1_DESCR     ,    
'UNKNOWN' AS MEASURE_VALUE_2_DESCR      ,   
'UNKNOWN' AS MEASURE_VALUE_3_DESCR    ,     
'UNKNOWN' AS MEASURE_VALUE_4_DESCR    ,     
'UNKNOWN' AS MEASURE_VALUE_5_DESCR      ,   
'UNKNOWN' AS MEASURE_VALUE_6_DESCR       ,  
'UNKNOWN' AS MEASURE_VALUE_7_DESCR       ,  
'UNKNOWN' AS MEASURE_VALUE_8_DESCR       ,  
'UNKNOWN' AS MEASURE_TARGET_VALUE_DESCR    ,
'UNKNOWN' AS MEASURE_TOLERANCE_VALUE_DESCR ,
N.MEASURE_VALUE_1_AMT AS MEASURE_VALUE_1_AMT,
X.MEASURE_VALUE_2_AMT AS MEASURE_VALUE_2_AMT,       
NULL AS MEASURE_VALUE_3_AMT    ,       
NULL AS MEASURE_VALUE_4_AMT    ,       
NULL AS MEASURE_VALUE_5_AMT      ,     
NULL AS MEASURE_VALUE_6_AMT      ,     
NULL AS MEASURE_VALUE_7_AMT    ,       
NULL AS MEASURE_VALUE_8_AMT     ,      
W.MEASURE_TARGET_VALUE_AMT AS MEASURE_TARGET_VALUE_AMT      ,
NULL AS MEASURE_TOLERANCE_VALUE_AMT,   
'AUTOMATED' AS MEASURE_BENCHMARK_CD         , 
NULL AS SORT_ORDER_POSITION_INT     ,  
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS LAST_UPDATE_DTM  ,             
'Y' AS METRIC_ACTIVE_FLG    ,         
'UNKNOWN' AS BATCH_ID    ,                  
NULL AS MEASURE_VALUE_PREV_QTR_1_AMT  ,
NULL AS MEASURE_VALUE_PREV_QTR_2_AMT  ,
NULL AS MEASURE_VALUE_PREV_QTR_3_AMT  ,
NULL AS MEASURE_VALUE_PREV_QTR_4_AMT  ,
NULL AS MEASURE_VALUE_PREV_QTR_5_AMT  ,
NULL AS ACTION_PLAN_CMT         ,      
NULL AS KEY_DRIVER_CMT       ,         
'UNKNOWN' AS MSR_VAL_PREV_QTR_1_AMT_DESCR  ,
'UNKNOWN' AS MSR_VAL_PREV_QTR_2_AMT_DESCR  ,
'UNKNOWN' AS MSR_VAL_PREV_QTR_3_AMT_DESCR  ,
'UNKNOWN' AS MSR_VAL_PREV_QTR_4_AMT_DESCR  ,
'UNKNOWN' AS MSR_VAL_PREV_QTR_5_AMT_DESCR  ,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM     ,           
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER            ,   
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM   ,             
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER
    FROM

(SELECT 
7 as BK_METRIC_ID_INT  ,
RFMTY.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT as BK_FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUM_INT,
'Total Engineering' AS BK_DIMENSION_3_DESCR  , 
CAST(CAST ((SUM(CASE WHEN RFMTY.FISCAL_YEAR_AGE = 0 THEN MEJEL4.NET_USD_ACTUALS_AT_BUD_RT_AMT ELSE MEJEL4.NET_USD_AMT END  )) AS DECIMAL (26,2) ) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS MEASURE_VALUE_1_AMT
          
FROM
	$$FINLGLVWDB.MT_APSP_MANAGEMENT_HIER MAMH 
	INNER JOIN    $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_EXP_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_4FY MEJEL4 
		ON  ( MEJEL4.BK_COMPANY_CD= MAMH.FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CODE
			AND	MEJEL4.BK_DEPARTMENT_CD = MAMH.FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT_CODE)
	INNER JOIN   $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR  RFMTY
		ON (RFMTY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT= MEJEL4.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT)
   	INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.R_PL_HIERARCHY RPH
   		ON  ( MAMH.FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CODE = RPH.FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CODE
			AND MAMH.FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT_CODE = RPH.FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT_CODE)       	
WHERE MAMH.NODE_LEVEL01_VALUE = '00511' 	
	AND MAMH.NODE_LEVEL02_NAME=(SEL NODE_NAME FROM $$PMMDATADB.APP_EL_FIN_DEPT_REGION
WHERE FINANCIAL_DEPT_NAME='SERVICES OPEX' AND REGION='WW_SALES')
	AND  RPH.NODE_LEVEL03_NAME =  'PROFORMA OPEX'
	AND RFMTY.FISCAL_YEAR_AGE IN (0,1,2)
   AND MEJEL4.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD   in (SELECT DISTINCT GENERATION_10_CD FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_EIS_GEN_ACCOUNT MEGA WHERE MEGA.GENERATION_3_CD = 'Expense Excluding Centralized Allocations')  
GROUP	BY RFMTY.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT ) N

FULL OUTER  JOIN (

SELECT 
	RFMTY.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT,
	CAST(CAST ((SUM(NEFC.USD_COMMIT_AMT))  AS DECIMAL (26,2) ) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) MEASURE_TARGET_VALUE_AMT
FROM  
	$$FINLGLVWDB.R_MANAGEMENT_HIERARCHY   RMH
	INNER JOIN  (SELECT  
                 					FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT       ,
               						FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT       ,
                					FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD            ,
                					EXPENSE_FUTURE_PUBLICATION_DT ,
                					COMPANY_CD                    ,
                					DEPARTMENT_CD                 ,
               						FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD          ,
                					FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT,
                					FUNCTIONAL_COMMIT_AMT         ,
                					USD_COMMIT_AMT                ,
                					USD_COMMIT_AT_ACTUAL_RATE_AMT ,
                					USD_COMMIT_AT_BUDGET_RATE_AMT 
                				FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_EXPENSE_FUTURE_COMMIT
                				WHERE (FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT,FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT,EXPENSE_FUTURE_PUBLICATION_DT)  IN 
                										( SELECT 
                 												NEFC.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT  ,
                												NEFC.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT ,
                												MAX(NEFC.EXPENSE_FUTURE_PUBLICATION_DT) AS EXPENSE_FUTURE_PUBLICATION_DT
                											FROM 
                												 $$FINLGLVWDB.N_EXPENSE_FUTURE_COMMIT NEFC,
               													 $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR RFD
                											WHERE 
                												 NEFC.EXPENSE_FUTURE_PUBLICATION_DT = RFD.CALENDAR_DATE
                											GROUP BY 1,2 )
                											AND (COMPANY_CD, DEPARTMENT_CD) in (sel FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CODE, FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT_CODE from $$FINLGLVWDB.R_PL_HIERARCHY where NODE_LEVEL03_NAME =  'PROFORMA OPEX' )  ) NEFC
  		ON( NEFC.COMPANY_CD=RMH.FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CODE
			AND  NEFC.DEPARTMENT_CD=RMH.FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT_CODE)
	INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFMTY
		ON (NEFC.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT = RFMTY.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT
			 AND NEFC.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT = RFMTY.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT)
WHERE   RFMTY.FISCAL_YEAR_AGE IN (0,1,2)
AND RMH.NODE_LEVEL01_VALUE = '00511' 	
AND RMH.NODE_LEVEL02_NAME=(SEL NODE_NAME FROM $$PMMDATADB.APP_EL_FIN_DEPT_REGION
WHERE FINANCIAL_DEPT_NAME='SERVICES OPEX' AND REGION='WW_SALES')
GROUP   BY 1) W
ON W.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT=N.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUM_INT

FULL OUTER JOIN (
SELECT 
	RFMTY.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT,
	CAST(CAST ((SUM(NEFB.USD_BUDGET_AMT))  AS DECIMAL (26,2) ) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) MEASURE_VALUE_2_AMT
FROM  
	$$FINLGLVWDB.R_MANAGEMENT_HIERARCHY   RMH
	INNER JOIN  (SELECT  
                 					FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT       ,
               						FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT       ,
                					FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD            ,
                					EXPENSE_FUTURE_PUBLICATION_DT ,
                					COMPANY_CD                    ,
                					DEPARTMENT_CD                 ,
               						FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD          ,
                					FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT,
                				   	USD_BUDGET_AMT  
                				FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_EXPENSE_FUTURE_BUDGET
                				WHERE (FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT,FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT,EXPENSE_FUTURE_PUBLICATION_DT)  IN 
                										( SELECT 
                 												NEFB.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT  ,
                												NEFB.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT ,
                												MAX(NEFB.EXPENSE_FUTURE_PUBLICATION_DT) AS EXPENSE_FUTURE_PUBLICATION_DT
                											FROM 
                												 $$FINLGLVWDB.N_EXPENSE_FUTURE_BUDGET NEFB,
               													 $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR RFD
                											WHERE 
                												 NEFB.EXPENSE_FUTURE_PUBLICATION_DT = RFD.CALENDAR_DATE
                											GROUP BY 1,2 )
                											AND (COMPANY_CD, DEPARTMENT_CD) in (sel FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CODE, FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT_CODE from $$FINLGLVWDB.R_PL_HIERARCHY where NODE_LEVEL03_NAME =  'PROFORMA OPEX' )  ) NEFB
  		ON( NEFB.COMPANY_CD=RMH.FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CODE
			AND  NEFB.DEPARTMENT_CD=RMH.FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT_CODE)
	INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFMTY
		ON (NEFB.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT = RFMTY.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT
			 AND NEFB.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT = RFMTY.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT)
WHERE   RFMTY.FISCAL_YEAR_AGE IN (0,1,2)
AND RMH.NODE_LEVEL01_VALUE = '00511' 	
AND RMH.NODE_LEVEL02_NAME=(SEL NODE_NAME FROM $$PMMDATADB.APP_EL_FIN_DEPT_REGION
WHERE FINANCIAL_DEPT_NAME='SERVICES OPEX' AND REGION='WW_SALES')
GROUP   BY 1) X
ON X.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT=N.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUM_INT
WHERE N.BK_METRIC_ID_INT=7 AND N.BK_DIMENSION_3_DESCR ='Total Engineering'
